'''ngadoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iyengar|iyengar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iyengar|iyengar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngadoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngædeyeth|ngædeyeth]] || [[word:ngædeyej|ngædeyej]] || [[word:ngædeyesh|ngædeyesh]] || [[word:ngædeye|ngædeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngadodoyoth|ngadodoyoth]] || [[word:ngadodoyoj|ngadodoyoj]] || [[word:ngadodoyosh|ngadodoyosh]] || [[word:ngadodoyo|ngadodoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngadoyoth|ngadoyoth]] || [[word:ngadoyoj|ngadoyoj]] || [[word:ngadoyosh|ngadoyosh]] || [[word:ngadoyo|ngadoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngadofyoth|ngadofyoth]] || [[word:ngadofyoj|ngadofyoj]] || [[word:ngadofyosh|ngadofyosh]] || [[word:ngadofyof|ngadofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngadoyotho|ngadoyotho]] || [[word:ngadoyojo|ngadoyojo]] || [[word:ngadoyosho|ngadoyosho]] || [[word:ngadoyoko|ngadoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngadoyoth|ngadoyoth]] || [[word:ngadoyoj|ngadoyoj]] || [[word:ngadoyosh|ngadoyosh]] || [[word:ngadoyo|ngadoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngadoyothol|ngadoyothol]] || [[word:ngadoyojol|ngadoyojol]] || [[word:ngadoyoshol|ngadoyoshol]] || [[word:ngadoyokol|ngadoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngadoyothotho|ngadoyothotho]] || [[word:ngadoyojojo|ngadoyojojo]] || [[word:ngadoyoshosho|ngadoyoshosho]] || [[word:ngadoyoko|ngadoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngadoyothon|ngadoyothon]] || [[word:ngadoyojon|ngadoyojon]] || [[word:ngadoyoshon|ngadoyoshon]] || [[word:ngadoyokon|ngadoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngadoyothoro|ngadoyothoro]] || [[word:ngadoyojoro|ngadoyojoro]] || [[word:ngadoyoshoro|ngadoyoshoro]] || [[word:ngadoyokoro|ngadoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
